summary: feat(fxa-settings): implement React pairing pages with Backbone parity
description:
Convert pairing flow from Backbone to React:
- Authority pages: AuthAllow, AuthTotp, AuthComplete, AuthWaitForSupp
- Supplicant pages: Supp, SuppAllow, SuppWaitForAuth
- Pairing channel integration and state machine
- Integration models for pairing authority and supplicant reliers
- Fix webpack alias for @fxa/shared/l10n module resolution
